description: Fix honor tiebreaker in Harvest and other places. Fix the honorTrack comparison logic: index 0 = honor position 1 = HIGHEST/BEST honor. Currently the code uses 'bIdx - aIdx' (favoring higher index = lower honor) which is WRONG. It should favor LOWER index (index 0 = best honor). Also fix the Harvest mandate: (1) ALL players receive 1 coin when harvest is executed, (2) Only issuer+ally harvest from provinces where they have majority, (3) Fix the honor tiebreaker sort to correctly compare (lower index = better honor = wins tie).
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, function executeHarvest() around line 601: Add logic to give ALL players +1 coin at the start of the harvest resolution (before checking majority).

In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, function executeHarvest() around line 634: Fix the honor tiebreaker sort. Current code: 'return bIdx - aIdx' which favors higher index. Change to 'return aIdx - bIdx' so that LOWER index (honor position 1 = best honor) wins the tiebreaker.

Search for all other places in gameLogic.ts where honor tiebreaker is used (resolveKamiTurn, resolveNextBattle, resolveWinter, applyWarUpgrades) and verify they correctly use the same logic: lower honorTrack index = better honor = wins. Current pattern 'challengerHonor > currentWinnerHonor' with indexOf is WRONG - it should be 'challengerHonor < currentWinnerHonor' since lower index = better. Fix ALL occurrences.
Update i18n/en.ts and i18n/es.ts to add a log message translation for the +1 coin to all players if needed (or just use a game log entry).
acceptance_criteria: Running 'npx tsc -b && npx vite build' passes without errors.
In executeHarvest: all players receive +1 coin before majority resolution.
Honor tiebreaker consistently uses lower honorTrack index as BETTER across all functions.
Only issuer and ally harvest provinces where they have majority force.
findings: All honor tiebreaker comparisons fixed across 6 locations in gameLogic.ts. The pattern was consistent: index 0 = honor position 1 = BEST honor, so lower index wins. Log messages use direct English strings (not i18n keys), so no i18n file changes were needed for the +1 coin log message. Build passes cleanly. POST-REVIEW FIX: gainHonor, loseHonor, and Amaterasu kami ability were still using the old convention (higher index = better). Fixed gainHonor to swap toward idx-1, loseHonor to swap toward idx+1, and Amaterasu to use unshift instead of push. The applyWarUpgrades steal-coin logic (Way of the Righteous) was already correct under the new convention. POST-REVIEW FIX v2: Fixed two remaining sites: (1) hire-ronin tiebreaker in resolveNextBattle used > instead of < for honor comparison, (2) Shinto Path of the Favored in calculateForce used honorTrack[length-1] instead of honorTrack[0]. Also explicitly preserved lastMandateIssuerId in cleanupSeason.
